policy.copyrightRule: Reference standard identifiers and local control intent only; do not copy paid-standard control text.

standards.name: NIST SP 800-218 Secure Software Development Framework
OWASP GenAI Security Project / LLM Top 10

controls.localControl: Agents must start material work from a bounded, queryable context packet and must not bulk-load generated mirrors.
Feature requirements must trace to user stories, use cases, criteria, UX contracts, journey states, and test evidence before implementation is complete.
Protected operations must name persona, role, scope, allowed path, denial path, and evidence before being treated as verified.

Agent tool and prompt-risk behaviors must be checked with local eval scenarios (including indirect injection and multi-agent propagation) and a deny-by-default guardrail policy enforced by a deterministic PreToolUse hook.
controls.threeLinesRole: first-line preventive control (the hook blocks at the tool gate); the eval gate is second-line independent assurance.

controls.localControl: Host repos must classify sensitive data, retention, deletion, export, residency, and subprocessor evidence in machine-readable sources.
Material agent deliverables must record source inputs, graph slice, files touched, tests, failures, decisions, and evidence for bug triage and rework reduction.
controls.threeLinesRole: third-line: append-only, event-sourced record supports independent review and non-repudiation.

controls.localControl: Every guardrail control is policy-as-code with an explicit enable/disable surface scoped by risk and context. Safe defaults are deny-by-default; always-on controls (destructive deny, audit append-only, forbidden-bulk read) cannot be disabled and are pinned in code. Toggling a control is a governed, audited action that writes an append-only audit decision event with reason, risk, and rollback; a hand-edit that relaxes an always-on control is rejected by guardrail-check and ignored by the hook.
controls.threeLinesRole: first-line preventive control with a second-line assurance gate (guardrail-check) and a third-line audit trail of every toggle.

controls.localControl: Deliverables that render to a user are typed, and a type inherits a versioned, deterministic check set (config/agentic/artifact-types.json). A typed deliverable cannot be audited without carrying its type's enforcing evidence. The web-image-asset type encodes dimensions, format, blank guard, edge-clip, contrast, and positive-on-light, enforced by the assetLint control (npm run asset:lint); its pixel reading is a small Rust helper. Completeness is a property of the control library, not the authoring agent's memory: every defect found once becomes a new line in the pack.
controls.threeLinesRole: first-line deterministic quality gate (asset-lint) with second-line typed-deliverable assurance (deliverable:audit) and a third-line audit/evidence trail.
